title: Podman 5.4.2 is missing on quay.io
body:
### Issue Description

Yesterdays 5.4.2 release is missing on quay.io.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

```console
$ podman pull quay.io/containers/podman:v5.4.2
Trying to pull quay.io/containers/podman:v5.4.2...
Error: initializing source docker://quay.io/containers/podman:v5.4.2: reading manifest v5.4.2 in quay.io/containers/podman: manifest unknown
$ podman pull quay.io/containers/podman:v5.4.2-immutable
Trying to pull quay.io/containers/podman:v5.4.2-immutable...
Error: initializing source docker://quay.io/containers/podman:v5.4.2-immutable: reading manifest v5.4.2-immutable in quay.io/containers/podman: manifest unknown
```


### Describe the results you received

manifest unknown

### Describe the results you expected

I would expect for the images to be published to quay.io in under 24h after the release is tagged.

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

Yes

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

I'm not sure if i should just be more patient, or there is an actual issue in the publishing pipeline.

comments.body:
The stable images are always build from fedora rpms so you need to wait until he update hits the stable fedora versions.
https://github.com/containers/image_build/blob/main/README.md

Thanks for the info @Luap99 

I'll go ahead and close this because it was indeed an issue with me needing to be more patient.
